measuring-tapes.title: Measuring Tapes
measuring-tapes.introText: We manufacture an extensive range of tape measures in various materials and sizes to suit every jobsite requirement. Each FREEMANS measuring tape is designed and manufactured at our dedicated facility, ensuring the highest standards of accuracy and durability. Explore our unmatched range of pocket tapes, long steel tapes, fiberglass tapes, and metal wire measuring tapes on our website. #MeasureTohFREEMANSHiKarega

spirit-levels.title: Spirit Levels
spirit-levels.introText: We are the largest manufacturers of Spirit Levels in India with an extensive portfolio catering to a large variety of jobsite applications. We ensure world-class quality control with in-house injection moulding, cutting, punching and powder coating operations. Our range starts from lightweight and economical Levels and includes heavy duty Aluminium profiles as well as Professional Spirit Levels. FREEMANS Spirit Levels are available with or without magnets. Our Spirit Levels claim an unmatched lifetime warranty in the Indian market. #LEVELUpWithFREEMANS

measuring-wheels.title: Measuring Wheels
measuring-wheels.introText: The FREEMANS portfolio boasts a range of highly accurate 150mm (6-Inch) and 300mm (12-Inch) Measuring Wheels, and also includes robust Digital Measuring Wheels. Our Measuring Wheels have an unmatched lifetime warranty in the Indian market. FREEMANS Measuring Wheels are ideal for measuring large surfaces, external and internal spaces single-handedly, including construction sites, paths, roads and fields. #FREEMANSBuildingINDIASince1950

test-and-measure-tools.title: Test And Measure Tools
test-and-measure-tools.introText: FREEMANS Test & Measure range includes high quality electronic measuring tools such as Laser Distance Meters, Laser Line Levels and Digital Spirit Levels. Measurement data can be read easily and quickly on illuminated digital displays, allowing for more efficiency and productivity at the workplace. Digital tools allow the user to change measurement units, and compute complex calculations such as area, at the simple click of a button. FREEMANS Digital Levels also provide accoustic guidance for manual alignment to objects. #LASERLikeFocusWithFREEMANS

precision-tools.title: Precision Tools
precision-tools.introText: FMI Limited are large suppliers of Precision Measuring Instruments in the Indian marketplace. Our portfolio includes high quality stainless steel Vernier Calipers, Digital Calipers, Dial Calipers, Micrometers and Digital Protractors. Our product are designed for high accuracy, high efficiency and  increased durability on jobsites.  All products in the FREEMANS Precision Tools range benefit from a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects. #AccuracylsATraditionWithFREEMANS
